title: A Crew Member on the Line
description: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Usopp, Zoro, Hamburg. Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: All of you should be prepared...

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: to become one of us per- manently!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The two teams are now tied!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The game type is the crowd favorite...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: First, we will pick the battle field....

dialogue.speaker: Tonjit
dialogue.text: We get to pick battle field?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Both players will now spin the cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright! Now the battlefield is chosen.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's time to explain the rules!

summary: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
